command:
cat > /etc/systemd/system/mybot.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Telegram Agent Bot on Claude
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=bot
WorkingDirectory=/home/bot/claude-bot
ExecStart=/home/bot/claude-bot/venv/bin/python /home/bot/claude-bot/agent_bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl restart mybot.service && sleep 3 && systemctl status mybot.service --no-pager | head -8
